title: BITF Q2 2024 Earnings: Beats EPS, Misses Revenue
text: Bitfarms delivered mixed results in Q2 2024. Earnings per share was ($0.07), beating analyst estimate of ($0.10). Revenue was $41.55 million, missing analyst estimate of $48.35 million by 14.07%. Company exceeded expectations on earnings front with loss per share smaller than anticipated. However, revenue performance fell short, coming in approximately 14% below analyst projections. The report reflects company's challenge in balancing operational efficiency with top-line growth during challenging market conditions in cryptocurrency mining sector.
